heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 99–498, title V, § 501(b)100 Stat. 1514Oct. 17, 1986
label: 4201 to 4206 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 99–498, title V, § 501(b)100 Stat. 1514Oct. 17, 1986
notes: Section 4201, , , , provided for citation of chapter as “Leadership on Educational Administration Development Act of 1984” and contained statement of purpose and declaration of Congressional intent in enacting chapter.Pub. L. 98–558, title IX, § 90198 Stat. 2902Oct. 30, 1984
Section 4202, , , , authorized appropriations for fiscal years 1985 to 1990 to carry out chapter.Pub. L. 98–558, title IX, § 90298 Stat. 2903Oct. 30, 1984
Section 4203, , , , provided for establishment of technical assistance centers.Pub. L. 98–558, title IX, § 90398 Stat. 2903Oct. 30, 1984
Section 4204, , , , set out general criteria for contracts to establish and operate technical assistance centers.Pub. L. 98–558, title IX, § 90498 Stat. 2904Oct. 30, 1984
Section 4205, , , , authorized Secretary to prescribe regulations to carry out chapter.Pub. L. 98–558, title IX, § 90598 Stat. 2904Oct. 30, 1984
